_comment: Octobots skill registry. Each entry maps a skill id to a published GitHub repo and a pinned ref (commit SHA, tag, or branch). install.sh uses this to resolve the skills declared in installed agents' `skills:` frontmatter. The install set is driven by agent declarations, not by a global default list — users get exactly what their team needs.

skills.description: Browser verification via CDP — visual checks, screenshots, accessibility
Structured code review — security, quality, conventions
Git branching, PR creation, and merge workflow
GitHub issue lifecycle — labelling, commenting, closing
End-to-end bugfix workflow — reproduce, test, fix, verify, document
End-to-end feature implementation workflow — plan, test, build, ship
Structured feature planning — requirements, feasibility, acceptance criteria
Generate AGENTS.md and .octobots/ config for a new project (used by scout)
Deep research workflow — trends, topic analysis, fact-checking
Cross-channel context gathering — email, Teams, local KB
Goal-backward verification — check outcomes, not task completion
